name: construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, inefficient blueprint conversion causes project delays. We automate project management plan creation instead of manual project planning and management tools.
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of blueprints into actionable project plans.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient conversion of blueprints into actionable project plans.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, inefficient blueprint conversion causes project delays. We automate project management plan creation instead of manual project planning and management tools.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual project planning and management tools

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, inefficient blueprint conversion causes project delays. We automate project management plan creation instead of manual project planning and management tools.
